title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Tech Mahindra Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tech Mahindra Holdings Services:
Tech Mahindra Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra Holdings Services!
